question: How do you view the commit history in Git?
answer:
```bash
# Basic log
git log

# One line per commit
git log --oneline

# With graph (branches)
git log --oneline --graph --all

# Last n commits
git log -5

# By author
git log --author="John"

# By date range
git log --since="2024-01-01" --until="2024-12-31"

# By file
git log -- path/to/file.txt

# Search commit messages
git log --grep="fix bug"

# Show changes in each commit
git log -p

# Show stats
git log --stat

# Pretty format
git log --pretty=format:"%h %s (%an, %ar)"
```

---
